About Me

WHERE VISION
MEETS
CRAFT

I'm a multi-disciplinary creative based in India — combining cinematic video editing, bold graphic design, and data-driven marketing to help brands tell stories that convert.

With a background in Adobe's full creative suite, I bring a full-stack creative vision to every project — from concept to final cut, from social media campaigns to immersive brand identities.

What I Offer

SERVICES

01 🎬
VIDEO EDITING
Cinematic edits for brand films, reels, YouTube, documentaries, and commercials. Motion graphics & color grading included.
Premiere Pro After Effects Color Grade
02 🎨
GRAPHIC DESIGN
Brand identities, social media graphics, print design, and marketing collateral that stands out in a crowded feed.
Illustrator Photoshop Canva
03 📈
PERFORMANCE MARKETING
Data-driven ad campaigns on Google & Meta — from creative strategy and targeting to optimization and reporting.
Google Ads Meta Ads
04 🌐
WEB DESIGN
Clean, visually-driven websites built on modern platforms. Portfolio sites, landing pages, and brand websites.
Wix Hostinger HTML/CSS UI/UX
05 ✨
CONTENT STRATEGY
Full creative direction for brands — from content calendars to cohesive visual identity across all touchpoints.
Social Media Branding Strategy

Process
BEHIND
THE DESIGN

Every poster begins as an idea — a mood, a message, or a feeling. Here's how the process unfolds from concept to final print-ready file.

01
CONCEPT & MOODBOARD
Defining the visual language — color story, typographic direction, compositional intention.
02
SKETCH & LAYOUT
Rough layouts exploring grid structure, hierarchy, and negative space before touching software.
03
DESIGN & REFINE
Executed in Illustrator and Photoshop — typography set, colors balanced, composition locked.
04
PRINT PREP
CMYK conversion, bleed setup, color proofing — print-ready at 300dpi minimum.
